mapper.select:
-- 1. 일반 프로젝트 일정 SELECT EVENT_ID AS id, TITLE AS title, TO_CHAR(START_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDt, TO_CHAR(END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDt, 'EVENT' AS itemType FROM EVENTS WHERE PROJ_ID = #{projId}
AND START_DT >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND END_DT <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
UNION ALL
-- 2. 국가 공휴일 SELECT HLD_ID AS id, HLD_NAME AS title, TO_CHAR(HLD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDt, TO_CHAR(HLD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDt, 'HOLIDAY' AS itemType FROM NATIONAL_HOLIDAYS WHERE HLD_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NATIONAL_HOLIDAYS ( HLD_ID, HLD_DATE, HLD_NAME, IS_REST, COUNTRY ) VALUES ( SEQ_HLD_ID.NEXTVAL, TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYYMMDD'), #{title}, 'Y', 'KR' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NATIONAL_HOLIDAYS WHERE TO_CHAR(HLD_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') = #{hldDate}
